rationale: Educ. Code §7.002 governs TEA composition and purpose. It has no operative relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no conflict arises.
quote: The agency shall carry out the educational functions specifically delegated under Section 7.021, 7.055, or another provision of this code.
_note: No textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this Education Code provision.
